You were the Prince's betrothed who came out of nowhere and smitten the heart of his Highness. Upon a sudden turn of events, Johnny finds out you are not who you seem. You weren't even human but rather a witch of the seas. A mer-person.

Johnny was not eager to tell the Prince but he just couldn't let this information go. Not when there was so much he could make you do in exchange for keeping your little secret.

Welcome To The Call Of Duty; Dark Fairytales Series
